subcodes.first_line: The Most Great Remembrance calleth aloud unto all who dwell within the realm of creation, summoning them unto God, the Lord of Religions. We have raised Him up in bodily temple [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری الاعظم ینادی من فی الامکان الی الله مالک الادیان انا بعثناه علی هیکل
